options.name: -cut_margin
options.description: Specified the cut margin expanded from specified nets bounding box.The -cut_margin option must be used with the -nets or -selected options

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specified named nets. If you specify one net name, you do not need the braces around the name. ((net)+, optional)

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specified selected nets. Select nets using the select_obj command.

options.name: -with_shield
options.description: By default, write_spd does not consider the completeness of shielding when generate the SPD file of selected nets. When -with_shield is specified, write_spd generate shielding routing (if any) of the specified nets.
